series_metadata.series_description: The Agency Budget Month End Reports break down all monthly expenditures for the agency. The Agency Budget Month End Reports include the following reports: Monthly reports (produced in Oracle Financials), Expenditure and Encumbrance reports, Monthly charge backs, Mass Allocation reports, Forecast reports, Variance reports, Reconciliation reports, Budget change log books, Overtime/Payroll recap reports, Month end analysis and Project reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: balancing and supporting documentation current year and one (1) fiscal year in Budget Unit – ; Electronic: current fiscal year and three (3) prior fiscal years on Budget SharePoint site –
